seo_title: The Sundune | Coastal Desert Retreat in Palm Springs | 3 King Beds
seo_description: The Sundune is a coastal-inspired desert condo in Palm Springs with 3 KING beds and walkable downtown location. Fresh, nostalgic, and effortlessly Palm Springs, just minutes from The Surf Club. Book direct, save 15%.
description_heading: Sun-bleached, sea-kissed, four minutes from Palm Canyon.
description_p1: The Sundune runs on a coastal-desert frequency: early light through linen curtains, copper fixtures catching the morning, cool aloe on the walls. Three king beds, a proper kitchen, and you're already four minutes from coffee, galleries, and everything downtown Palm Springs offers on foot.
description_p2: The design pulls from surf and sand without being a caricature of either. Real retro personality. Sun-bleached textures, natural materials, the kind of place that makes you want to stay in. Three king beds means three couples can share without anyone drawing straws over the pull-out. That almost never happens in Palm Springs.
description_p3: Walk out the door and you're in it: Palm Canyon Drive, coffee, galleries, restaurants, all on foot. This is the Palm Springs that regulars come back to.
description_p4: The Sundune is nostalgic in the right way. It doesn't recreate a specific decade. It captures a feeling. Long summers. Road trips. Salt air. The kind of vacation where you lose track of the date and consider staying an extra night because leaving feels wrong.
